If you need to capture a GitHub page screenshot:  
1. Use your browser’s built-in screenshot tools (Ctrl+Shift+I on Windows, Cmd+Opt+I on Mac).  
2. GitHub’s "Share" button provides a direct link to the page.  
3. Third-party tools like Lightshot or Nimbus Screenshot can automate this.
